Operation 'getJobRunLogs' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary and description are identical and overly generic. Enhanced version specifies that logs are retrieved for a particular job run execution, clarifies the return value (log entries with diagnostic information), and provides context about typical use cases (monitoring, troubleshooting, auditing) to help AI agents understand when to invoke this operation.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve logs for a specific job run execution
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the execution logs for a specific job run identified by job_id and run_id. Returns log entries containing diagnostic information, error messages, and execution details from the job run. Logs are typically used for monitoring job execution status, troubleshooting failures, and auditing data transformation activities.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are identical and overly generic. Enhanced version specifies that logs are retrieved for a particular job run execution, clarifies the return value (log entries with diagnostic information), and provides context about typical use cases (monitoring, troubleshooting, auditing) to help AI agents understand when to invoke this operation.

message: Operation 'encryptMigrationData' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary and description lack specificity about purpose and context. Enhanced version clarifies that encryption is for secure migration transfer, specifies input/output expectations (accepts data, returns encrypted data), and provides domain context about when this operation is used in migration workflows to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.summary_suggestion: Encrypt sensitive data for secure migration transfer
data.description_suggestion: Encrypts sensitive migration data using secure encryption protocols to prepare it for safe transfer during DataStage migration operations. Accepts migration data in the request body and returns encrypted data suitable for secure transmission. This operation is typically used before exporting job definitions, configurations, or other sensitive metadata during migration workflows.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack specificity about purpose and context. Enhanced version clarifies that encryption is for secure migration transfer, specifies input/output expectations (accepts data, returns encrypted data), and provides domain context about when this operation is used in migration workflows to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'decryptMigrationData' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary and description are too generic and lack operational context. Enhanced version clarifies that decryption restores previously encrypted data, specifies input/output expectations (accepts encrypted data, returns decrypted data), and provides domain context about the migration workflow to help AI agents understand when and why to use this operation.

data.summary_suggestion: Decrypt encrypted data from migration transfer
data.description_suggestion: Decrypts previously encrypted migration data to restore it to its original form during DataStage migration operations. Accepts encrypted migration data in the request body and returns the decrypted data. This operation is typically used after importing encrypted job definitions, configurations, or other sensitive metadata during migration workflows to make the data usable in the target environment.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too generic and lack operational context. Enhanced version clarifies that decryption restores previously encrypted data, specifies input/output expectations (accepts encrypted data, returns decrypted data), and provides domain context about the migration workflow to help AI agents understand when and why to use this operation.

data.summary_suggestion: Stop an executing DataStage job run
data.description_suggestion: Stops an actively executing DataStage job run by job ID and run ID. Sends a cancellation signal to the running job; the job may take time to gracefully terminate. Returns the updated run object with status changed to 'cancelled'. Only running jobs can be cancelled; already completed runs cannot be cancelled.
data.reasoning: Summary uses passive 'Cancel' instead of active verb. Description lacks critical details about execution state, graceful termination, and state constraints. Improved summary to use 'Stop' (more action-oriented) and added details about run status requirements and expected behavior.
